ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( OwnerId )&& CONTAINS(Owner:User.UserRole.Name ,"SDR")&& $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps Extended" && NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'MIR' ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Meeting cannot be reassigned back to SDR.
